84c37feb-d788-5d14-a90d-1598bda4cf01.content_en:
TOTT Staking Special Promotion Notice

Hello,
This is the TomaTok operations team.

Thank you to everyone participating in TOTT staking.

To grow TOTT staking and expand member benefits, we are running a special promotion in addition to the existing referral rewards provided by the TOTT smart-contract system.

Key details

1. Special promotion
We are running a separate special promotion on top of referral rewards from the TOTT smart-contract system.

2. When referral rewards begin
TOTT staking referral benefits start after one month from signup—interest and referral income accrue from that point.

3. Purpose
This special promotion is a limited additional benefit offered by headquarters to promote TOTT staking and expand member benefits.

4. Promotion criteria
Payout tiers and criteria are temporary settings for running this promotion and are unrelated to the official marketing plan from headquarters.
Please treat them as reference criteria for this limited-time promotion only.

5. Possible changes
The promotion period may change based on operations, and bonus payout criteria may also change.

6. Promotion period
This promotion will continue until business activation goals are met. As of now, it is planned to run through December 2026.

7. After the promotion ends
After it ends, we will announce new plans and operations separately.

Thank you for your interest and participation.

Best regards,
TomaTok Operations Team

fe894c49-4670-5935-aa67-be98064b3938.content_en:
TOTT Burn Notice

Supply Adjustment: 300 Million TOTT Burn

•Purpose of the Burn
Token economy stabilization
Long-term value enhancement
Supply control

•Operational Holdings (Before Burn)
Total 10,000,000,000 TOTT (operational wallet)

•Burn Amount
300,000,000 TOTT

•Operational Holdings (After Burn)
Total 9,700,000,000 TOTT (operational wallet)

•Burn Date
January 20, 2026

•Burn Source
A portion of the operational wallet holdings

•Burn Method
Transferred to a burn address and permanently removed

•Verification
Burn address
Transaction Hash (TxID): TX_HASH

•Post-Burn Impact
Reduction in total (or circulating) supply
No change to individual holder balances

•Disclaimer
This is not investment advice
Price or profit is not guaranteed
Investment decisions are the sole responsibility of the user

fix_ko.title: TOTT 소각 안내
fix_ko.content:
TOTT 소각 안내

총 3억 TOTT 공급량 조정(소각)

•소각 목적
토큰 이코노미 안정화
장기 가치 제고
공급량 조정

•운영 보유량(소각 전)
총 100억 TOTT(운영 지갑 기준)

•소각 수량
총 3억 TOTT 소각

•운영 보유량(소각 후)
총 97억 TOTT(운영 지갑 기준)

•소각 일정
2026.01.20

•소각 대상
운영 지갑 보유 물량 중 일부

•소각 방식
Burn 주소로 전송 후 영구 제거

•검증 방법
Burn 주소
트랜잭션 해시(TxID): TX_HASH

•소각 후 영향
총 공급량(또는 유통량) 감소
홀더 보유량은 변동 없음

•유의사항
투자 권유 아님
가격/수익 보장 불가
투자 판단 책임은 이용자 본인

386654b4-4d5e-5c2f-a1de-45d459e8a3f2.content_en:
Dear shareholders,

Thank you for your continued interest and support for NeedsPersand Co., Ltd.

The Seoul extraordinary general meeting held on Wednesday–Thursday, October 30–31, 2025, has concluded successfully. Results are as follows.

■ Date & venue

Date: October 30 (Wed) – 31 (Thu), 2025, 2:00 PM
Venue: Meta Art Hall, B1, GRC Yeoksam Meeting Space

■ Attendance

Total Seoul shareholders: 193
Shareholders present: 138 (quorum met with majority attendance)

■ Resolutions
Agenda 1: Changes related to TOTT distribution from the TomaTok staking pool ▶ Passed unanimously
Agenda 2: Tomacones NFT distribution ▶ Passed unanimously
Agenda 3: Dividend distribution method, treatment, and benefits ▶ Passed unanimously

All agenda items put forward at this extraordinary general meeting were passed unanimously. Further details will be shared individually later.

Namjin Kim
CEO, NeedsPersand

a2401754-d3d4-5f08-a0d3-0eaf8b9d5f22.title_en: Notice of TomaTok Extraordinary General Meeting
a2401754-d3d4-5f08-a0d3-0eaf8b9d5f22.content_en:
Dear shareholders,

Thank you for your continued interest and support for NeedsPersand Co., Ltd.

Important matters requiring shareholder approval have arisen. We will hold an extraordinary general meeting as follows. Your attendance would be appreciated.

■ Date
October 30 (Wed) – 31 (Thu), 2025, 2:00 PM sharp (two days)

■ Venue
Meta Art Hall, B1, GRC Yeoksam Meeting Space

■ Purpose of the meeting
A. Attendees: Seoul headquarters shareholders only
B. Changes to TOTT policy
C. Smart-contract entry conditions
D. Equity distribution method, treatment, and benefits

NeedsPersand
CEO Namjin Kim

1e73a7c4-5eab-5e44-a378-94c896688115.content_en:
Hello, TomaTok users!

The group chat feature you’ve been waiting for is finally here! Chat with friends as a group and enjoy richer conversations.

Introducing Group Chat

Group chats with friends

Talk with multiple friends at once:

1. Chat together
- Chat with multiple friends at the same time
- Create separate group chats for family, friends, and coworkers
- Move beyond 1:1 chat for livelier group conversations

2. Inviting members
- Select friends from your list and invite them to a group chat

3. Real-time group communication
- Every member can receive messages in real time
- Share photos, videos, files, and more within the group

Simultaneous translation in up to 5 languages

Global group chat without language barriers:
- Group chats support simultaneous translation for up to 5 languages
- Members can chat in their own language and still be understood
- Mix Korean, English, Japanese, Chinese, Spanish, and more
- Natural, accurate translation powered by real-time AI

A better TomaTok with group chat

More active communication
- Share daily life in a family group and build memories
- Dive into hobbies and interests with friends
- Share work information and collaborate with teammates

Connect with global friends
- Group chat naturally even when languages differ
- Practice with native speakers in language-learning groups
- Explore cultures in cultural exchange groups

Easy information sharing
- Share schedules and plans in a travel group in real time
- Share materials and discuss in study groups
- Stay updated with people who share your interests

A safe, enjoyable group chat environment

Privacy & security
- All group chats are protected with end-to-end encryption
- New members cannot join without host and member consent
- Report inappropriate content to keep chats healthy
- Leave any group anytime

AI translation quality
- Advanced AI that understands context for accurate meaning
- Everyday and specialized topics translate accurately
- Quality keeps improving through ongoing AI learning
- Check the original text if a translation seems off

Building a global community together

With group chat, TomaTok is growing beyond one-to-one messaging into a global community where many groups can connect.

Even when languages differ, communicate freely with up to 5-language simultaneous translation, and create groups with friends around the world.

Update and try it now!

Update to the latest TomaTok to experience group chat. Richer conversations with friends are waiting for you!

Contact us anytime with questions.

Support
Email: needspersand@tomatok.io
1:1 inquiry

— The TomaTok Team

© 2025 NeedsPersand Co., Ltd. All rights reserved.

1f29c58d-ee52-57b8-a8fb-697b36f4b42a.title_en: Introducing New Ways to Add Friends
1f29c58d-ee52-57b8-a8fb-697b36f4b42a.content_en:
Hello, TomaTok users!

New ways to add friends are now available! Connect more easily with users around the world and expand who you can talk to.

Introducing New Friend Features

Add friends in multiple ways

Use the Add Friend button on the main Friends page:

1. Add by QR code
- Scan someone’s QR code to add them instantly
- Quick and easy when you meet in person
- Share your QR code so others can add you

2. Add by email
- Enter an email address to send a friend request
- Connect easily even over long distances
- With the right email, you can add friends from anywhere

3. Add from open chat rooms
- Add other users you’ve met in open chats
- Make friends naturally with people who share your interests
- Continue chatting one-to-one after you’ve gotten to know each other

Automatic friends from contacts

Easier friend management:
- Contacts who use TomaTok are added as friends automatically
- Start chatting with people you already know—no extra steps
- Your friend list stays safe even if you change devices or reinstall the app

New connections beyond contacts

Expand your network:
- Be friends with users worldwide who aren’t in your contacts
- Chat freely across languages with real-time AI translation
- Learn languages and cultures with global friends

How to add friends

Step-by-step
1. Go to the main Friends page in the TomaTok app
2. Tap Add Friend
3. Choose QR scan, email, or add from open chat
4. Send a request and wait for acceptance
5. Once added, start chatting and calling right away

A richer TomaTok experience

Richer communication
- See and manage all contacts in one friend list
- Check recent conversations and activity per friend
- Pin important friends to the top

Stable sync and backup
- Friend lists restore automatically after device changes or reinstalls
- Cloud-based friend management keeps the same list anywhere
- Keep friend relationships safe without worrying about lost contacts

Build a global network
- Connect with users in many countries
- Chat naturally across languages with real-time AI translation
- Create opportunities for cultural exchange and language learning

Our privacy commitment

For friend features:
- Contact information is used only to add friends—never for other purposes
- We do not share contact data with third parties without consent
- Friend-list data is encrypted and stored securely
- You can disable friend features anytime if you prefer

Building a global community together

With these friend features, TomaTok is growing beyond a simple messenger into a global communication platform that connects people worldwide.

Meet new friends across language and distance, chat freely with AI translation, and experience secure crypto features—all in one place.

Update and try it now!

Update to the latest TomaTok and try the new friend features. New connections with users around the world are waiting!

Contact us anytime with questions.

Support
Email: needspersand@tomatok.io
1:1 inquiry

— The TomaTok Team

© 2025 NeedsPersand Co., Ltd. All rights reserved.

d2ed166d-3865-57ca-a244-9e151e6ee3a5.content_en:
Beta test update

Hello, TomaTok users!

Lucky TomaTok Roulette is currently in beta. We’re working hard to make it more fun and stable—thanks for your patience!

About the game

Lucky TomaTok Roulette is TomaTok’s special points game!

- Free daily roulette plays
- Chances to win points and special rewards
- Simple one-tap gameplay
- A new lucky chance every day

During the test

- Test participation: Beta is open to selected users
- You can still try the game during the test period
- Game data may be reset when the test ends
- Feedback welcome: please report bugs or ideas for improvement

Important

We will announce point handling separately later.

- Points earned during the test are temporary
- Official point policy will be shared when the service launches fully
- Earning and using points will be explained in detail at launch

Official launch

Lucky TomaTok Roulette is planned to launch fully in June 2025.

- We’re preparing more rewards and events for launch
- Watch for more fun features on TomaTok
- Special launch events are also planned

Contact & feedback

Email: needspersand@tomatok.io
1:1 inquiry

— The TomaTok Team

© 2025 NeedsPersand Co., Ltd. All rights reserved.

86b730f2-f778-5af6-a425-652af3ad9bf5.content_en:
Hello, TomaTok users!

TomaTok is a next-generation messenger for talking with people around the world. Chat freely across languages, and handle secure crypto activity—all in one app.

What is TomaTok?

TomaTok is a global social messenger with a Solana blockchain wallet and real-time AI translation.

From secure crypto management to smooth chats with multilingual users—experience it all with TomaTok.

Key features

Solana wallet
- Store, send, and pay with crypto in a secure blockchain wallet
- Stronger private-key security protects your assets
- Designed so anyone can use crypto features easily

Real-time AI translation chat
- Automatic real-time translation for 100+ languages
- Translate text, voice, and image-based messages instantly
- Communicate globally without language barriers
- Translation quality keeps improving with the latest AI

1:1 video/voice calls — a core TomaTok feature
- High-quality voice and clear video calls
- Special call alerts so you don’t miss calls

About call alerts:
For TomaTok’s core calling feature, we show full-screen incoming-call alerts even when the screen is locked.

We use full-screen notification permission only for call alerts—never for ads or other purposes.

Convenient chat
- Start chatting with a phone number—no signup required for basic chat flows
- Supports 1:1 chat, group chat, and a chat-with-yourself room
- Reactions, quick replies, photos/contacts, and more multimedia chat
- An intuitive interface anyone can use

App permissions

TomaTok may request the following permissions to provide a better service. All are optional; you can still use basic features if you decline.

Optional permissions
- Storage: send and save photos, videos, and files
- Phone: check device authentication status
- Contacts: friend recommendations and adding friends
- Camera: video calls and QR recognition
- Microphone: voice calls, video calls, and voice messages
- Bluetooth: connect wireless audio devices
- Full-screen notifications: show incoming calls full-screen on the lock screen

Our permission promise

Privacy commitment:
- Permissions are used only for the stated features
- Personal information is protected and never shared with third parties without consent
- Basic features still work if you decline permissions
- Some advanced features may require the relevant permission

Get started!

Start a new way to communicate with TomaTok—talk freely with users worldwide and use secure crypto features in one place.

Questions? Contact us anytime.

Support
Email: needspersand@tomatok.io
1:1 inquiry

— The TomaTok Team

© 2025 NeedsPersand Co., Ltd. All rights reserved.

d32bb1e3-6f6c-5c94-ae32-c8fd3888aca7.content_en:
Privacy Collection and Use Policy

Contents

Article 1 (Purpose)
Article 2 (Personal Information Collected)
Article 3 (Purpose of Collection and Use)
Article 4 (Retention and Use Period)
Article 5 (Provision to Third Parties and Outsourcing)
Article 6 (User Rights and How to Exercise Them)
Article 7 (Technical and Administrative Safeguards)
Article 8 (Automatic Collection Devices — Installation, Operation, and Opt-out)
Article 9 (Privacy Officer and Contact)
Article 10 (Changes and Notice)

Article 1 (Purpose)

These terms set out matters related to the collection and use of personal information when using the TomaTok service (“Service”) provided by NeedsPersand Co., Ltd. (“Company”).

The Company complies with applicable laws, including the Personal Information Protection Act and the Act on Promotion of Information and Communications Network Utilization and Information Protection, to protect users’ personal information.

Article 2 (Personal Information Collected)

The Company may collect the following personal information to provide the Service.

Required: name, email, contact (phone number)
Optional: address, gender, service usage records, device information
Automatically collected: access logs, cookies, IP address, browser type and version, access time

Collection methods
Entered by the user during signup/use, or generated automatically while using the Service.

Article 3 (Purpose of Collection and Use)

The Company uses collected personal information for:

Service provision and operation: providing TomaTok, content, personalized services, identity verification
Member management: identity checks, signup/withdrawal, membership services, fraud prevention
Customer support: inquiries, complaints, notices, service improvement
Communications and alerts: service emails, updates, important notices
Marketing and advertising: events and promotional information, personalized services (with separate consent)
Service improvement: visit frequency, usage statistics, new service development
Legal obligations: statutory retention, dispute resolution

Marketing use of personal information requires separate consent; declining marketing consent does not restrict basic Service use.

Article 4 (Retention and Use Period)

In principle, personal information is destroyed without delay once the purpose of collection and use is achieved.
Where laws require retention for a set period, information is stored for that period.

Records / Retention / Law
Contracts or withdrawal of offers / 5 years / Electronic Commerce Act
Payment and supply of goods / 5 years / Electronic Commerce Act
Consumer complaints or dispute handling / 3 years / Electronic Commerce Act
Visit records / 3 months / Protection of Communications Secrets Act

Article 5 (Provision to Third Parties and Outsourcing)

Third-party provision
The Company does not provide personal information to third parties in principle, except with prior consent or as required by law.

Outsourcing
The Company may outsource processing for smooth service delivery and strengthens protection through contracts with processors.

Processor / Work / Retention
AWS (Amazon Web Services) / Cloud servers and data storage / Until outsourcing ends
NHN Toast / SMS/email delivery / Deleted immediately after sending

Article 6 (User Rights and How to Exercise Them)

Rights
Access: confirm how your information is processed
Correction/deletion: request correction or deletion of inaccurate information
Suspension of processing: request processing to stop
Damages: claim damages for privacy infringement

How to exercise
You may view or edit your information anytime and request deletion by withdrawing membership.
Upon request for access, correction, deletion, or suspension, the Company takes necessary action without delay.
Privacy complaints may be filed through customer support.
For children under 19, a legal representative may exercise rights on their behalf.

Contact for rights requests
Email: needspersand@gmail.com
Phone: +8210-8919-6324
Processing time: within 10 days of the request

Article 7 (Technical and Administrative Safeguards)

The Company takes measures including:

Technical
Encrypted storage and transmission
Access control and stronger authentication
Security systems against hacking and malware
Intrusion prevention systems

Administrative
Minimizing staff with access and appointing responsible persons
Regular privacy training and checks
Internal privacy management plans
Audits of processing status

Article 8 (Automatic Collection Devices)

Cookies
The Company uses cookies to store and retrieve usage information for personalized services.

Purpose: convenience, personalization, understanding visits and usage
Opt-out: refuse cookies in browser settings
Impact of refusal: personalized features may be limited

Cookie settings
Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies and other site data
Firefox: Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data
Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Cookies and website data

Article 9 (Privacy Officer and Contact)

Privacy officer
Name: Namjin Kim
Affiliation: NeedsPersand Co., Ltd.
Email: needspersand@tomatok.io
Phone: +8210-8919-6324

Privacy team
Team: Development
Contact: Namjin Kim / needspersand@tomatok.io

Reporting and counseling agencies (Korea)
Personal Information Dispute Mediation Committee: 1833-6972 (www.kopico.go.kr)
Personal Information Infringement Report Center: 118 (privacy.kisa.or.kr)
Supreme Prosecutors’ Office: 1301 (www.spo.go.kr)
National Police Agency: 182 (ecrm.cyber.go.kr)

Article 10 (Changes and Notice)

These terms may change due to law or policy updates.
Changes are announced in advance on the official website or by email.
Important changes are announced at least 7 days in advance; for material changes such as collection/use or third-party provision, at least 30 days in advance.

Notice methods
In-app notices on TomaTok
Email provided at signup
On-screen notices via popup or banner

Addendum

Article 1 These terms take effect from February 20, 2025.

Last updated: May 26, 2025

© 2025 NeedsPersand Co., Ltd. All rights reserved.

fe46dc1b-eca8-5643-aa05-287842c765ab.content_en:
TomaTok Terms of Service

Contents

Article 1 (Purpose)
Article 2 (Definitions)
Article 3 (Effect and Changes)
Article 4 (Provision and Changes of the Service)
Article 5 (Restriction and Suspension of Use)
Article 6 (User Obligations)
Article 7 (Company Obligations)
Article 8 (Disclaimer)
Article 9 (Governing Law and Jurisdiction)

Article 1 (Purpose)

These terms set out the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between NeedsPersand Co., Ltd. (“Company”) and users regarding use of the TomaTok service (“Service”).

Article 2 (Definitions)

“User” means a person who uses the Service under these terms.
“Member” means a person who has joined the Service and uses it.
“Non-member” means a person who uses the Service without joining.
“Content” means all information provided in the Service (text, images, video, etc.).
“Account” means unique identification information set by a user to use the Service.

Article 3 (Effect and Changes)

① These terms take effect when a user accesses the Service and agrees.
② The Company may change these terms within the limits of applicable law; changes are announced in advance via in-app notice or email.
③ Users who disagree may stop using the Service; continued use is deemed acceptance of the changed terms.

Notice of changes
In-app notices on TomaTok
Email provided at signup
Important changes announced at least 7 days in advance

Article 4 (Provision and Changes of the Service)

① The Company provides services such as:
Online platform
Content and information
Communication among members
Personalized recommendations
Other services designated by the Company

② The Company may change part or all of the Service and will notify users in advance.
③ The Company may continuously add or modify features to improve the Service.

Article 5 (Restriction and Suspension of Use)

① The Company may restrict or suspend use if:
The user violates laws or these terms
Maintenance or inspection of facilities is needed
Force majeure such as natural disaster, outage, or system failure occurs
Fees are unpaid (where applicable)
The Company judges provision of the Service inappropriate for other reasons

② Except for willful misconduct or gross negligence, the Company is not liable for damages from restriction or suspension.
③ Scheduled downtime is announced in advance; urgent cases may be announced afterward.

Article 6 (User Obligations)

① Users must comply with these terms and applicable laws.
② Users must not:
Infringe others’ rights or disrupt operations
Provide false information or steal others’ information
Post illegal or inappropriate content (obscenity, violence, etc.)
Interfere with stable operation of the Service
Infringe the Company’s intellectual property

③ Users are responsible for protecting account information and for harm from disclosure.
④ Users should change passwords periodically and must not share them.

Article 7 (Company Obligations)

① The Company complies with laws and these terms and strives for smooth operations.
② The Company protects personal information under applicable law and its privacy policy.
